result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to instill a universal sense of empathy in every person. Empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others—could bridge divides, reduce conflict, and foster cooperation on a global scale. It would mean people wouldn’t just act out of self-interest but would genuinely consider the impact of their actions on others, whether it’s in personal relationships, politics, or how we treat the environment. I think a lot of the world’s problems, from inequality to war to climate neglect, stem from a lack of seeing things from someone else’s perspective. If everyone could feel that connection, even just a little more, I believe we’d build a kinder, more sustainable world. What do you think about that?
